titleStmt.title: SII 26.247: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 247. (A.R. No. 235 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.note: The second 1st year has not been given in the A.R.S.I.E., 1909.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete. It states that a certain Veḷḷāṭṭi named Ūrankōvi alias Kaḷabhamānachchay donated 5 Paḻañjalāgai achchu to provide for the services on Śivarāttiri days to the god Kulaiśēkhara-īśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻamādēvinallūr. This money was utilised for doing repairs to the maṇḍapa, in the temple. In lieu thereof the king made a gift of paddy at the rate of 6 kalam per year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cirivikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatukku Etir Etir co
ḻamātevinallūr Āḷuṭaiyār kulaicekara Īcuramuṭaiyāṟku civarāttirait tanma(m)
ttukku meṟpaṭi Ā veḷḷāṭṭi periyakaṉal Ūrankoviyāna kaḷapamāṉaccayen Oṭukkina paḻañcalākai A
ccu nālun tirumaṇṭapat tiruppaṇikku Iṭṭamaiyāl Innāyanāṟkut tevatānattil veṭṭivicca nila Upaiyam
Aḷakkunellile Āṭṭaikku Aṟukala nel Upaiyattukkuc celuttivaruvatākavum Ittanma cantirātittavaraiyum
Digital edition of SII 26.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
